ksa_text: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, accountability structures across organizational boundaries, and facilitating cross-domain solutions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of integrating the organization’s goals and objectives into the architecture.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Accountability structures are in place so that the appropriate teams and individuals are empowered, responsible, and trained for mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the AI Innovation Lead. This task KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (senior specialist).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.479). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the AI Innovation Lead versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for AI Innovation Lead.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy task KSA is within scope for the AI Innovation Lead at the senior specialist tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
